_comment: Copy this file to config.json and adjust as needed.
'memory' — all data is lost when the server stops (default, good for one-off tests).
'file'   — data is written as JSON files under 'path' and survives restarts.
Files are written atomically (temp-then-rename) so a crash mid-write
will never leave a corrupt file.
When seed_data is true and a data file already has records, seeding is skipped
so existing data is preserved across restarts.
